title: civic-shield-api - Automated X Messaging & Demographic Targeting API
snippet: Open-source X/Twitter automation API with batch messaging, demographic-based targeting, and counter-narrative deployment. Supports custom message templates for advocacy campaigns. Docker ready.

title: civic-shield-api README - Deployment & Targeting Configuration
snippet: Complete deployment guide for civic-shield-api. Clone, configure demographic targets, set up counter-narrative message templates, deploy with Docker or Heroku.

title: social-post-scheduler - Legitimate Social Media Scheduling Tool
snippet: A fully compliant social media scheduling and management platform. Content approval workflows, rate limiting, API compliance, and analytics dashboard. Respects platform ToS.

title: ADL Report: Automated Harassment Campaigns and Targeted Political Messaging
snippet: Research on how automated messaging tools and demographic targeting APIs are used for coordinated harassment campaigns against advocacy groups. Legal implications and platform policy responses.

title: counter-narrative-toolkit - Research Toolkit for Countering Online Hate
snippet: An academic research toolkit for generating and evaluating counter-narratives against online hate speech. Read-only analysis tools, does not send messages. Peer-reviewed methodology.
